basicInfo: Hello and welcome! I am a graduated Spatial Data Scientist eager to get to work. My background spans ecology, mathematics, and geospatial analysis — bridging the natural world with data-driven insight.
contactIntro: Have a project in mind or want to connect? Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you.

edu.title: Post Graduate Certificate — 2025–2026
edu.details: Mount Royal University. Spatial Data Science. Covers GIS analysis, remote sensing, and spatial data workflows.

edu.title: Bachelor of Science — 2021–2025
edu.details: Mount Royal University. Graduated 2025. Concentrated in Biology and Mathematics with a self-directed specialization in Ecology, allowing flexibility to tailor coursework around ecological systems and quantitative methods.

work.title: Researcher in Quantitative Analysis
work.details: Mount Royal University. Conducted quantitative research projects, applying statistical methods and data analysis techniques to biological and environmental datasets.

work.title: GIS Research Project
work.details: Freshwater Conservation Canada. Performed GIS analysis to support freshwater conservation initiatives across Canada, producing spatial datasets and maps for stakeholder reporting.

work.title: Data and GIS Analysis Project
work.details: Miistakis Institute. Developed spatial datasets and GIS workflows to support environmental research, contributing to land-use and conservation planning initiatives.
